data.body: RESUME (operator: 'update from origin/main + continue toward completion'). Updated: origin/main advanced 15 commits; tip 485873652 'harden durable write path against concurrent-git faults' FIXES the flaky enrich-drain-prune concurrency test that blocked R6/R7 (verified 3/3 local passes on rebased tree). Rebased R6(062987955)+R7(8ce0cf8ef) onto new main; pre-flight gates all green (lint/typecheck/11 unit tests/module-size); re-pushed stack to Gerrit #760/#761 patchset-2. LLM-Review +1 CARRIED across rebase on both; Verified re-running. DISCOVERY: new BLOCKING plan-review criterion project.portability added on main -> invalidated E2/E3/E6 plan-review attestations (registry-changed error on claim). Launched 3 bg re-reviews (E2 d125, E6 a880, E3 def5) under new registry from cal-e2 worktree@origin/main. Set up cal-e2 worktree+venv[dev,agents]. NEXT: each re-review PASS -> claim -> delegate harness build to subagent -> run eval. E2 highest-leverage (gates R1/R3/R4; corpus reused by R2).
